# Carousel

An image/content carousel component for cycling through slides with navigation controls, indicators, and optional autoplay.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  Carousel,
  CarouselItemGroup,
  CarouselItem,
  CarouselControl,
  CarouselPrevTrigger,
  CarouselNextTrigger,
  CarouselIndicators,
  CarouselIndicator,
  CarouselIndicatorGroup,
  CarouselAutoplayTrigger,
  CarouselAutoplayIndicator,
  CarouselProgressText,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Carousel` | The root carousel container. |
| `CarouselItemGroup` | Container for all carousel slides. |
| `CarouselItem` | An individual slide. |
| `CarouselControl` | Container for prev/next navigation buttons. |
| `CarouselPrevTrigger` | Button to navigate to the previous slide. |
| `CarouselNextTrigger` | Button to navigate to the next slide. |
| `CarouselIndicators` | Container for dot indicators. |
| `CarouselIndicator` | A single dot indicator. |
| `CarouselIndicatorGroup` | Group wrapper for indicators. |
| `CarouselAutoplayTrigger` | Button to toggle autoplay. |
| `CarouselAutoplayIndicator` | Visual indicator for autoplay state. |
| `CarouselProgressText` | Displays current slide progress (e.g., "2 / 5"). |

## Props

### Carousel

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `slideCount` | `number` | - | Total number of slides. |
| `slidesPerPage` | `number` | `1` | Number of slides visible at once. |
| `slidesPerMove` | `number` | `1` | Number of slides to advance per navigation action. |
| `spacing` | `string` | - | Gap between slides. |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `"horizontal"` | The scroll direction of the carousel. |
| `allowMouseDrag` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether mouse dragging is enabled. |
| `autoplay` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the carousel auto-advances slides. |
| `loop` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the carousel loops back to the beginning. |

## Usage

### Basic Carousel

```jsx
<Carousel slideCount={3}>
  <CarouselItemGroup>
    <CarouselItem index={0}>Slide 1</CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem index={1}>Slide 2</CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem index={2}>Slide 3</CarouselItem>
  </CarouselItemGroup>
  <CarouselControl>
    <CarouselPrevTrigger />
    <CarouselNextTrigger />
  </CarouselControl>
</Carousel>
```

### Carousel with Indicators

```jsx
<Carousel slideCount={4} loop>
  <CarouselItemGroup>
    <CarouselItem index={0}>
      <img src="/image1.jpg" alt="Slide 1" />
    </CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem index={1}>
      <img src="/image2.jpg" alt="Slide 2" />
    </CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem index={2}>
      <img src="/image3.jpg" alt="Slide 3" />
    </CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem index={3}>
      <img src="/image4.jpg" alt="Slide 4" />
    </CarouselItem>
  </CarouselItemGroup>
  <CarouselControl>
    <CarouselPrevTrigger />
    <CarouselNextTrigger />
  </CarouselControl>
  <CarouselIndicatorGroup>
    <CarouselIndicator index={0} />
    <CarouselIndicator index={1} />
    <CarouselIndicator index={2} />
    <CarouselIndicator index={3} />
  </CarouselIndicatorGroup>
</Carousel>
```

### Autoplay Carousel

```jsx
<Carousel slideCount={3} autoplay loop allowMouseDrag>
  <CarouselItemGroup>
    <CarouselItem index={0}>Slide 1</CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem index={1}>Slide 2</CarouselItem>
    <CarouselItem index={2}>Slide 3</CarouselItem>
  </CarouselItemGroup>
  <CarouselAutoplayTrigger>
    <CarouselAutoplayIndicator />
  </CarouselAutoplayTrigger>
  <CarouselProgressText />
</Carousel>
```
